content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Harmon Retail Group
Customer ID: C005
Contract ID: K016
Account Executive: James Okafor
Call Type: Strategic Account Review
Date: July 22, 2025
Participants: James Okafor (AE), Sandra Harmon (COO), Darius Moore (Regional Manager, West)

James Okafor: Sandra, great to connect mid-year. You're one of our top accounts and I wanted to make sure we're aligned on where things stand and where you want to go.

Sandra Harmon: We're in a good place. The distribution center team has fully adopted the platform — Darius can speak to that.

Darius Moore: Distribution center has been using it for about six months now. The supervisors are managing shift handoff documentation through DataSync Pro and it's cut down on miscommunications significantly. No complaints.

Sandra Harmon: James, I want to revisit the franchise partner conversation. We now have 34 active franchise locations and they're operating independently from our documentation. It creates inconsistency. I want to explore a read-only access tier for franchise partners.

James Okafor: I've been pushing internally on that since you raised it last year. The honest answer is it's not on the roadmap for 2025. What we can do in the interim is create a shared folder structure that franchise partners access via a guest link — it's not as clean as a dedicated tier but it solves the core problem.

Sandra Harmon: That's better than nothing. Can you walk me through how that would work?

James Okafor: Absolutely. I'll set up a short demo next week and we can decide if it meets your needs while we wait for a proper solution.

Sandra Harmon: Works for me. Let's do it.
